product_overview: Govlyx is a community-driven feed where users browse local communities and posts, vote on polls, interact with content (like, save, share), and manage community membership. The frontend exposes feed, profile, community, and post views for authenticated user interactions.
core_goals: Browse a personalized feed of posts and polls
Vote in polls and immediately see updated results
Like, save, and share posts from the feed
Discover, join, and leave local communities
View and manage personal profile and activity

features.name: Poll Voting
features.description: Allow authenticated users to cast votes on poll options in the feed and observe immediate result updates.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> Navigate to / -> See a poll in the feed -> Select a poll option to vote -> See progress bar fill and percentage update

Navigate to / -> Attempt to vote on a poll without logging in -> Be prompted to log in -> Navigate to /login -> Complete login -> Return to / -> Select a poll option to vote -> See progress bar fill and percentage update

features.name: Post Interactions
features.description: Enable authenticated users to like posts, save posts to their account, and share post links to the clipboard from the feed.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> Navigate to / -> Like a post -> See like count and visual state update
Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> Navigate to / -> Save a post -> See saved state reflected in the post
Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> Navigate to / -> Share a post -> Link is copied to clipboard -> See confirmation of successful copy

features.name: Community Management
features.description: Let authenticated users discover communities, join them to participate, and leave communities they are already members of.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> Navigate to /communities -> Find a community of interest -> Join a community -> See membership status update
Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> Navigate to /communities -> Find a community you are a member of -> Leave the community -> See membership removed

features.name: Poll Voting
features.description: Users can vote on options in a poll and see real-time results.
user_interactions: Click a poll option to vote
See progress bar fill and percentage update

features.name: Post Interactions
features.description: Like, save, and share posts in the feed.
user_interactions: Click share icon to copy link

features.name: Community Management
features.description: Join and participate in local communities.
user_interactions: Click Join button to join a community
